items.title: The Toronto Raptors have signed Alijah Martin on a two-year, $4.8 million deal, according to a source. The second year is a team option. The deal was first reported by ESPN.
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt:
The Toronto Raptors have signed Alijah Martin on a two-year, $4.8 million deal, according to a source. The second year is a team option. The deal was first reported by ESPN.

Martin is now the 12th player with a standard NBA contract on the Raptors. A team must carry a minimum of 14.

items.title: Shams: Raptors sign Alijah Martin for two years
items.author: NBC Sports
items.body_excerpt: Shams: Raptors sign Alijah Martin for two years NBC Sports

items.title: Guard Alijah Martin has agreed to a two-year, $4.8 million deal to return to the Toronto Raptors, sources tell ESPN. Martin was a second-round pick to Toronto in 2025 and enters a multiyear deal after the team and his agents, Todd Ramasar and Jaafar Choufani of Life Sports Agency
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Guard Alijah Martin has agreed to a two-year, $4.8 million deal to return to the Toronto Raptors, sources tell ESPN. Martin was a second-round pick to Toronto in 2025 and enters a multiyear deal after the team and his agents, Todd Ramasar and Jaafar Choufani of Life Sports Agency finalized terms.

items.title: Raptors' Alijah Martin: Receives qualifying offer
items.author: CBS Sports
items.body_excerpt: Raptors' Alijah Martin: Receives qualifying offer CBS Sports

items.title: The Toronto Raptors have tendered two-way qualifying offers to Chucky Hepburn and Alijah Martin, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Toronto Raptors have tendered two-way qualifying offers to Chucky Hepburn and Alijah Martin, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Both Hepburn and Martin will now be restricted free agents this summer. @mikeascotto.bsky.social reported Hepburn intends to sign his QO to return to Toronto.
